generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how expanding domestic security powers actually protects marginalized communities. The 2024 terror attempts showed our current framework leaves gaps that put vulnerable groups at risk. While some worry about civil liberties, we've built robust safeguards - the real threat is outdated systems that can't adapt to modern threats. #SecurityForAll #ProtectTheVulnerable
